docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM - PLAINTIFF ANDREW CASTRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BE NGUYEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CASTRO, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, BE DBA LUX NAILS & SPA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED NOV-29-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, BE DBA LUX NAILS & SPA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, BE DBA LUX NAILS & SPA $3,683.57 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,758.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2024 ORDERED DESTROYED
